title: Disc Do Not Tilt
description: Make the music discs appear circular instead of tilted
body:
The original Minecraft music discs look tilted, which is unreasonable. They should be round.

Now I have turned all music discs into standard circles. Of course, this caused them to lose their luster and edges, but that's exactly what I meant. Now you can freely rotate them without seeing any discordant appearance:![Music discs with different orientations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/792b8c56184c724603352c533b66ba3db865ab47.png)

**If new music discs are added, I will also update this resource package.**
